text.title: Cost-Per-DAU Defense Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure: pull ledger, rank drivers, benchmark, plan, format.

step.name: pull-ledger
step.input: cost ledger over 30 days + DAU counter
step.action: Aggregate per-call inference cost; compute 30-day total / 30 / avg DAU = cost_per_dau_usd.
step.decision-gate: If DAU under 100, defense is premature; abort and write a roadmap memo instead.

step.name: rank-drivers
step.input: per-call ledger with model + request_type + tool-call tags
step.action: Group by tag; rank by total cost contribution; take top 3 that together sum to at least 70 percent.

step.name: benchmark
step.input: topic of the feature + manual research seed URLs
step.action: Find at least one peer reference (vendor pricing page, public earnings line item, named blog post) with comparable unit metric. Record citation URL + accessed_at date.

step.name: plan
step.action: Pick three concrete interventions tied to the three drivers (e.g., model swap, prompt cache, dedup tool calls). Name a single owner. Set a numeric target_cost_per_dau_usd reachable in 90 days.
step.decision-gate: If target is more than 50 percent below current, split into multiple defense reports (90-day fence).

step.name: format
step.action: Render the 1-page Markdown report from templates/cost-per-dau-defense-template.md. Validate against the JSON schema. Set version=1.0.0, last_reviewed=today.
step.output: cpd-<feature>-<quarter> report ready for owner sign-off

list.item: Drivers sum to at least 70 percent
Peer benchmark cites a verifiable source
